title: cordylanthus rigidus subsp. littoralis
intro: Cordylanthus rigidus subsp. littoralis, also known as the Beach Plume, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the mint family and is native to the coastal areas of California. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are derived from its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of the Beach Plume include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and support the immune system, making it a popular natural remedy for various ailments. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
